---
title: "ECLIPSE Lab — Presentations & Teaching"
description: "Lecture slides, conference talks, and course materials from the ECLIPSE Lab at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg."
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .site-hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(59,130,246,0.18), rgba(139,92,246,0.14));
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 2.5rem 3rem;
    margin: 2rem 0 3rem 0;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .site-hero h1 { color: #f8fafc; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; border: none; }
  .site-hero p { color: #94a3b8; font-size: 1.1rem; margin: 0; }
  
  .lecture-container {
    background: rgba(20,25,40,0.65);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }
  .unit-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .unit-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .unit-item:last-child {
    border-bottom: none;
  }
  .unit-item:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  }
  .unit-badge {
    background: rgba(59,130,246,0.15);
    color: #93c5fd;
    border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.2);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-family: monospace;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-right: 1.5rem;
    min-width: 70px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .unit-name {
    flex: 1;
    color: #e2e8f0;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .unit-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
  }
  .action-btn {
    text-decoration: none !important;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.3rem;
  }
  .action-slides {
    background: rgba(139,92,246,0.15);
    color: #c4b5fd;
    border: 1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.3);
  }
  .action-slides:hover {
    background: rgba(139,92,246,0.3);
    color: #fff;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }
  .action-source {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    color: #94a3b8;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  }
  .action-source:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    color: #fff;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }
  .back-lab {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 4rem;
    padding-top: 2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  }
  .back-lab a { color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.95rem; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; }
  .back-lab a:hover { color: #93c5fd; }
  
  /* Mobile responsiveness */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .site-hero { padding: 2rem; }
    .unit-item {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 0.8rem;
    }
    .unit-badge { margin-right: 0; }
    .unit-actions { margin-top: 0.5rem; width: 100%; justify-content: flex-start; }
  }
</style>
```
 


## Data Science for Electron Microscopy

```{=html}
<div class="lecture-container">
  <div class="unit-list">
<!-- BEGIN units:data_science_for_em -->
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 01</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Intro</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/01_intro/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/01_intro/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 02</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Regression</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/02_regression/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/02_regression/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 03</div>
      <div class="unit-name">CNNs</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/03_cnns/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/03_cnns/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 04</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Self-Supervised Learning</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/04_selfsupervised/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/04_selfsupervised/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 05</div>
      <div class="unit-name">GANs</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/05_gan/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/05_gan/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 06</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Gaussian Processes</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/06_gaussian_processes/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/06_gaussian_processes/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 07</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Gaussian Processes II</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/07_gaussian_processes2/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/07_gaussian_processes2/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 08</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Imaging Inverse Problems I</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/08_imaging_inverse_problems1/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/08_imaging_inverse_problems1/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 09</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Imaging Inverse Problems II</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="data_science_for_em/09_imaging_inverse_problems2/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/data_science_for_em/09_imaging_inverse_problems2/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
<!-- END units:data_science_for_em -->
  </div>
</div>
```

## Mathematical Foundations of AI & ML

```{=html}
<div class="lecture-container">
  <div class="unit-list">
<!-- BEGIN units:mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml -->
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 01</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Learning vs Data Analysis; Models, Loss Functions</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/01_learning_vs_data_analysis/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/01_learning_vs_data_analysis/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 02</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Linear Algebra Refresher; Covariance, PCA/SVD</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/02_linear_algebra_pca_svd/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/02_linear_algebra_pca_svd/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 03</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Regression as Loss Minimization</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/03_regression_as_loss_minimization/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/03_regression_as_loss_minimization/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 04</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Neural Networks — From Neurons to CNNs</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/04_neural_networks_backprop/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/04_neural_networks_backprop/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 05</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Clustering &amp; Autoencoders</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/05_clustering_and_autoencoders/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/05_clustering_and_autoencoders/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 06</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Loss Landscapes &amp; Optimization Behavior</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/06_loss_landscapes_optimization/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/06_loss_landscapes_optimization/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 07</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Generalization, Bias-Variance, Regularization, Tree Ensembles</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/07_generalization_bias_variance/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/07_generalization_bias_variance/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 08</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Probabilistic View of Learning; Noise</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/08_probabilistic_view_of_learning/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/08_probabilistic_view_of_learning/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 09</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Latent Spaces &amp; Advanced Representation Learning</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/09_latent_spaces_advanced/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/09_latent_spaces_advanced/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 10</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Attention &amp; Transformers</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/10_attention_transformers/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/10_attention_transformers/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 11</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Generative Models — VAE &amp; Diffusion</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/11_generative_vae_diffusion/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/11_generative_vae_diffusion/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 12</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Uncertainty in Predictions</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/12_uncertainty_in_predictions/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/12_uncertainty_in_predictions/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 13</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Physics-Informed &amp; Constrained Learning</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/13_physics_informed_learning/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/13_physics_informed_learning/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 14</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Explainability, Limits, and Scientific Trust</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/14_explainability_limits_trust/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/14_explainability_limits_trust/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
<!-- END units:mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml -->
  </div>
</div>
```

## Materials Genomics

```{=html}
<div class="lecture-container">
  <div class="unit-list">
<!-- BEGIN units:materials_genomics -->
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 01</div>
      <div class="unit-name">What is Materials Genomics?</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/01_intro/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/01_intro/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 02</div>
      <div class="unit-name">QM Postulates, Solvable Systems, Multi-Electron Atoms</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/02_qm_postulates_and_atoms/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/02_qm_postulates_and_atoms/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 03</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Quantum Chemistry Methods (HF, MP, CC, DFT)</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/03_quantum_chemistry_methods/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/03_quantum_chemistry_methods/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 04</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Thermodynamics, Statistical Mechanics &amp; Classical Atomistic Simulation</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/04_thermodynamics_and_atomistic_simulation/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/04_thermodynamics_and_atomistic_simulation/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 05</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Graph-Based Crystal Representations</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/05_graph_based_rep/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/05_graph_based_rep/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 06</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Local Atomic Environments</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/06_local_atomic_envs/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/06_local_atomic_envs/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 07</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Regression and Generalization in Materials Data</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/07_regression_and_generalization_in_materials_data/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/07_regression_and_generalization_in_materials_data/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 08</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Neural Networks for Materials Properties</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/08_neural_networks_for_materials_properties/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/08_neural_networks_for_materials_properties/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 09</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Representation Learning and Feature Discovery</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/09_representation_learning_and_feature_discovery/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/09_representation_learning_and_feature_discovery/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 10</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Latent Spaces of Materials</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/10_latent_spaces_of_materials/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/10_latent_spaces_of_materials/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 11</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Clustering vs Discovery in Materials Spaces</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/11_clustering_vs_discovery_in_materials_spaces/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/11_clustering_vs_discovery_in_materials_spaces/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 12</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Uncertainty-Aware Discovery &amp; Gaussian Processes</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/12_uncertainty_aware_discovery_and_gaussian_processes/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/12_uncertainty_aware_discovery_and_gaussian_processes/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 13</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Physical Constraints, Trust, and Integration Outlook</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="materials_genomics/13_constraints_trust_and_integration_outlook/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/materials_genomics/13_constraints_trust_and_integration_outlook/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
<!-- END units:materials_genomics -->
  </div>
</div>
```

## Machine Learning for Characterization and Processing

```{=html}
<div class="lecture-container">
  <div class="unit-list">
<!-- BEGIN units:ml_for_characterization_and_processing -->
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 01</div>
      <div class="unit-name">What makes materials data special?</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit01_intro/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit01_intro/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 02</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Physics of data formation</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit02_physics_of_data/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit02_physics_of_data/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 03</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Data quality, labels, and leakage</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit03_data_quality/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit03_data_quality/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 04</div>
      <div class="unit-name">From classical microstructure metrics to learned representations</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit04_microstructure_representations/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit04_microstructure_representations/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 05</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Unsupervised methods for materials — clustering &amp; autoencoders</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit05_unsupervised_learning/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit05_unsupervised_learning/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 06</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Data scarcity &amp; transfer learning</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit06_transfer_learning/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit06_transfer_learning/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 07</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Time-series and process monitoring</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit07_time_series/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit07_time_series/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 08</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Generalization, robustness, and process windows</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit08_generalization_robustness/01_intro.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit08_generalization_robustness/01_intro.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 09</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Inverse problems and process maps</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit09_inverse_problems/09_inverse_problems.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit09_inverse_problems/09_inverse_problems.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 10</div>
      <div class="unit-name">ML for characterization signals</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit10_characterization_signals/10_characterization_signals.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit10_characterization_signals/10_characterization_signals.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 10b</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Transformers for materials (ViT, Flash Attention, Mamba)</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit10_transformers_for_materials/transformers_for_materials.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit10_transformers_for_materials/transformers_for_materials.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 11</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Automation in microscopy and characterization</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit11_automation/11_automation.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit11_automation/11_automation.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 12</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Uncertainty-aware regression &amp; Gaussian Processes</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit12_uncertainty_gp/12_uncertainty_gp.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit12_uncertainty_gp/12_uncertainty_gp.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 13</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Physics-informed and constrained ML</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit13_pinns/13_pinns.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit13_pinns/13_pinns.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Unit 14</div>
      <div class="unit-name">Integration, limits, and reflection</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit14_reflection/14_reflection.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit14_reflection/14_reflection.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
<!-- END units:ml_for_characterization_and_processing -->
  </div>
</div>
```

## Conference Talks

```{=html}
<div class="lecture-container">
  <div class="unit-list">
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Talk</div>
      <div class="unit-name">2025 MC</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="conference_talks/2025_MC/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/conference_talks/2025_MC/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="unit-item">
      <div class="unit-badge">Talk</div>
      <div class="unit-name">2025 M&M</div>
      <div class="unit-actions">
        <a href="conference_talks/2025_MandM/template.html" class="action-btn action-slides">Open Slides</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/public_presentations/blob/main/conference_talks/2025_MandM/template.qmd" class="action-btn action-source" target="_blank">Source</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::{.back-lab}
[← Back to ECLIPSE Lab](https://pelzlab.science)
:::
